"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.generatorInfosMap = void 0; var generatorFunctions = require("./generators/index.js"); var deprecatedGeneratorFunctions = require("./generators/deprecated.js"); const generatorInfosMap = exports.generatorInfosMap = new Map(); let index = 0; for (const key of Object.keys(generatorFunctions).sort()) { if (key.startsWith("_")) continue; generatorInfosMap.set(key, [generatorFunctions[key], index++, undefined]); } for (const key of Object.keys(deprecatedGeneratorFunctions)) { generatorInfosMap.set(key, [deprecatedGeneratorFunctions[key], index++, undefined]); } //# sourceMappingURL=nodes.js.map
